title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (23), UNDER "NUEVA VIZCAYA," SUBSECTION G. SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 7454 / 53 OG No. 23, 8479 (December 15, 1957

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2026, June 22, 1957 ]

AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (23), UNDER "NUEVA VIZCAYA," SUBSECTION G. SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (23), under "Nueva Vizcaya," subsection

g

, section two of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven, is amended to read as follows:

"23. Solano-Wacal Road P7,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1957.
